summary: CC block is functionally complete with 2 minor issues: CRLF line endings causing lint errors, and unused columns context variable in child block. All core functionality works correctly including dark mode, Swiper integration, ThemeButton with arrow, shouldDisplay, and renameBlock.

build.notes: Build compiles successfully with only bundle size warnings (not errors)

typecheck.notes: TypeScript compiles with no type errors

lint.notes: All CC block TSX/JS files have CRLF line endings instead of LF, causing prettier/prettier errors

child.note: Context is received but columns variable is currently unused in CCItem.tsx (line 38). This is technically correct as per spec but could be cleaned up.

darkModeWrapperClasses.tsx: relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8
darkModeWrapperClasses.php: relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8

cardInnerClasses.tsx: w-full h-full bg-accent rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col
cardInnerClasses.php: w-full h-full bg-accent rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col

implementation.wrapperClasses: relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 (with conditional)

tsx.className: btn-tertiary-arrow text-charcoal! group inline-flex items-center gap-2

php.className: btn-tertiary-arrow text-charcoal! group inline-flex items-center gap-2
php.afterParam: span wrapper with inline SVG matching ArrowIcon.svg

implementation.arrowWrapperClasses: inline-flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full transition-all group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green group-focus:bg-charcoal group-focus:text-neon-green
implementation.notes: Arrow hover/focus state correctly implemented with CSS circle (not SVG)

parent.usage: shouldDisplay() imported and used for Appender visibility
Called in ThemeHeading onChange with heading value

semanticHtml.buttons: Navigation controls with aria-label and title

accessibility.swiperA11y: A11y module included in Swiper config

issues.description: All CC block TSX/JS files have CRLF line endings instead of LF, causing prettier/prettier lint errors

fix.command: For each file: sed -i 's/\r$//' <file> OR use editor to convert line endings

issues.description: In CCItem.tsx, the 'columns' variable from context is declared but never used

fix.suggestion: Remove the unused columns variable declaration or add a comment explaining future use

issues.notes: The spec includes context for columns, but the child block doesn't currently use it for any conditional logic. This is not technically an error since the context may be intended for future use.

passedChecks: Build compiles without TypeScript or compilation errors
TypeScript type checking passes
Both takt/cc and takt/cc-item blocks register correctly
All block files exist (block.json, index.tsx, component TSX, PHP template, SVG icon)
All parent attributes defined correctly with proper types and defaults
All child attributes defined correctly with proper types and defaults
Context sharing works: parent provides takt/cc/columns, child receives it
TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure
All conditional classes match between TSX and PHP
Dark mode follows ContentWithMedia pattern with pseudo-element charcoal cards
ThemeButton with arrow injection works using 'after' prop
Arrow hover state uses CSS circle (group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green)
Swiper integration complete with Navigation, Pagination, Autoplay, A11y modules
Frontend JS properly initializes Swiper from data attributes
Mobile navigation separate from desktop navigation
shouldDisplay() used correctly for optional content in editor
renameBlock() syncs heading (parent) and title (child) to block name in list view
InnerBlocks properly configured with allowedBlocks and template
Appender component used for adding new cards
Responsive columns work: mobile=1, tablet=min(attr,2), desktop=attr
Test page contains actual block instances with multiple variations
Semantic HTML used (section, h2, h3, buttons)
Accessibility attributes present on navigation buttons
